## Status (Agent 03)

**Onboarding:** Read `AGENTS.md`, `01-studio-onboarding.mdc`, `10-orchestrator-logging-contract.mdc`, `agent-03-techdir-onboarding.mdc`, PM hub `wk51_attachment_ux_phase3` / `wk51_r7_recall_right_panel_pin_emoji`, and your existing `wk51_r6` log entry.

**Implementation:** In `apply_hud_pin_action` → `recall_pinned_hero`, after `center_camera_on_world_pos`, the same HUD path as `try_select_hero` runs: `right_panel_visible = True` and `_micro_view.enter_hero_focus(target)`. `center_camera_on_world_pos` already ends with `setattr(self, "_ursina_hud_force_upload", True)`, so no extra Ursina change.

```1401:1410:game/engine.py
            self.selected_hero = target
            self.center_camera_on_world_pos(float(target.x), float(target.y))
            if hasattr(self, "hud"):
                try:
                    self.hud.right_panel_visible = True
                    if hasattr(self.hud, "_micro_view"):
                        self.hud._micro_view.enter_hero_focus(target)
                except Exception:
                    pass
            return
```
